vBRIEFInfo.description: Document feature slicing (tracer-bullet vertical slices) in the root README

plan.title: docs(readme): document feature slicing and complete the gh-dependent skill list

narratives.Description: The root README.md does not mention feature slicing at all, and its Platform Requirements skill list (the gh-dependent skills) omits deft-directive-gh-slice and deft-directive-gh-arch even though both require the GitHub CLI.
narratives.Origin: Operator request during an interactive session asking whether feature slicing is documented in the README.
narratives.Acceptance: README.md gains a concise 'Feature slicing' subsection that explains tracer-bullet vertical slices (vertical vs horizontal, AFK/HITL, dependency ordering, durable slices.jsonl cohort records, and the triage:audit orphan/stalled/coverage surfaces) and links to the canonical skill. The gh-dependent skill list in Platform Requirements is corrected to include deft-directive-gh-slice and deft-directive-gh-arch. A CHANGELOG [Unreleased] entry is added. task check passes.
narratives.Overview: Documentation-only change. Source of truth for the slicing process remains skills/deft-directive-gh-slice/SKILL.md; this surfaces the capability at the top level so users can discover it from the README.

items.title: Add a 'Feature slicing' subsection to README.md
Add deft-directive-gh-slice and deft-directive-gh-arch to the gh-dependent skill list in Platform Requirements
